channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Visceral Fat Raises Heart Failure Risk Independently of BMI
item.description: New research presented at the American Heart Association's EPI|Lifestyle Scientific Sessions 2026 highlights the link between belly fat, also known as visceral fat, and the risk of heart failure, even...

item.title: Le Bistro Introduces All-Day Breakfast to Celebrate Second Anniversary
item.description: Le Bistro, the popular French-inspired restaurant located in Gateway Mall, Quezon City, has expanded its menu to include all-day breakfast offerings as it marks its second year of operations. Known fo...

item.title: FIFA imposes fine on Israeli FA over failure to address racism and discrimination in football
item.description: FIFA has imposed a fine of 150,000 Swiss francs on the Israeli Football Association (IFA) for multiple violations of its anti-discrimination regulations. The decision followed an investigation trigger...

item.title: Kool & the Gang's 'Celebration' Remains Popular in Tanzania During Eid and Other Festive Events
item.description: Today on March 20, 2026, Tanzanians are celebrating Eid El Fitr across the country, but no new special song was composed for this occasion. Instead, the classic hit 'Celebration' by Kool & the Gang ha...

item.title: Harriet Harman criticises Angela Rayner's intervention against Keir Starmer's Labour government
item.description: Harriet Harman, a veteran Labour peer, has criticised former deputy prime minister Angela Rayner for making what she described as a 'negative intervention' against Sir Keir Starmer's Labour government...

item.title: Simba and Azam drop points, giving Yanga breathing space in Tanzania Premier League title chase
item.description: The Mainland Tanzania Premier League title race has taken a new twist after both Simba SC and Azam FC failed to win their matches on March 19, 2026, allowing leaders Young Africans (Yanga) to keep a c...

item.title: Review: Ibram X Kendi’s Chain of Ideas examines the great replacement theory as the foundation of modern authoritarian politics
item.description: In his new book Chain of Ideas, Ibram X Kendi presents a detailed analysis of the so-called ‘great replacement theory’, arguing that it forms the ideological core of what he describes as our current a...

item.title: Burial dates and venues for Gustavo and Diana Mwai announced by families
item.description: The families of Nairobi-based biker Elvis Khamala, popularly known as Gustavo, and his wife Diana Mwai, have officially announced their burial arrangements following their tragic death on March 15, 20...

item.title: Canadian Bills Expand Government Surveillance and Digital Oversight
item.description: The article by John Carpay warns that Canada is rapidly expanding state surveillance and online regulation under recent federal bills. Bill C-2, initially proposed in June, would have allowed governme...

item.title: New call-ups Fernandez, Otele, and Sor set for Super Eagles debut in friendlies
item.description: This article from Premium Times explores the maiden call-ups of three players—Emmanuel Fernandez, Philip Otele, and Yira Sor—to Nigeria's Super Eagles squad for March 2026 friendlies against Iran and ...

item.title: Weekly Political Cartoon Gallery Highlights Satire on Current U.S. Politics
item.description: This POLITICO feature presents a curated selection of the best political cartoons from across the United States, showcasing the work of talented artists from various publications and representing a wi...

item.title: Zulum Appeals For Understanding And Prayers Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: The Governor of Borno State, Professor Babagana Zulum, don address the people of the state, dey ask for forgiveness for any mistake wey fit don happen under him administration. He tell people make dem...

item.title: Israel conducts airstrikes on Tehran amid escalating US-Israel conflict with Iran; Netanyahu hints at potential ground operations
item.description: Israel launched airstrikes on Tehran as Iranians celebrated Nowruz, the Persian New Year, with reports of explosions around the capital. This followed Israel's pledge to halt further strikes on Iran's...

item.title: G Sudhakaran Announces Campaign Against CPI Minister P Prasad in Cherthala Amid Ongoing Rift in Kerala CPM
item.description: G Sudhakaran, a rebel leader from the Communist Party of India (Marxist) and a four-time MLA, has announced that he will actively campaign against Kerala Agriculture Minister P Prasad in the Cherthala...

item.title: Study warns of severe economic risks for Pakistan from potential Strait of Hormuz disruptions
item.description: Ek taza study jo Pakistan Institute of Development Economics (PIDE) ne conduct ki hai, yeh highlight karti hai ke Pakistan ki economy Strait of Hormuz mein kisi bhi disruption ke liye bohat zyada vuln...

item.title: Allegation of Assault Against Delta Sports Commission Chairman Over Disputed Reimbursement
item.description: This matter na serious allegation wey involve the Chairman of Delta State Sports Commission, Onoriode Oborevwori, wey also be younger brother to Governor Sheriff Oborevwori. According to reports, the ...

item.title: Homa Bay Governor Criticised for Cabinet Reshuffle Over Gender Rule Compliance
item.description: Homa Bay Governor Gladys Wanga is facing backlash from gender activists following her recent cabinet reshuffle and nomination of a new deputy governor. Activists argue that the changes undermine the t...

item.title: Aston Martin deny reports of Adrian Newey stepping down as team principal despite leadership speculation
item.description: Aston Martin have quashed rumours that Adrian Newey is set to relinquish his role as team principal amid a difficult start to the 2026 Formula 1 season. Multiple media outlets reported that the legend...

item.title: DOTr Announces Temporary Toll Discounts for Public Utility Vehicles, Buses, and Freight on NLEX, SLEX, and STAR Starting March 23, 2026
item.description: The Department of Transportation (DOTr) has announced a two-month toll discount for public utility vehicles (PUVs), buses, and freight services on major expressways like NLEX, SLEX, and STAR, effectiv...

item.title: Asmah Majed rises in Tanzanian comedy through university roots and everyday humour
item.description: Asmah Majed, known on stage as Asmaah Jamida, has become one of the leading female comedians in Tanzania’s growing stand-up scene. Her journey started in 2019 while she was a university student servin...
